% This is generated by ESQL's SplitTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
ROW words="foo;bar;baz;qux;quux;corge"
| EVAL word = SPLIT(words, ";")
```

| words:keyword | word:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| foo;bar;baz;qux;quux;corge | [foo,bar,baz,qux,quux,corge] |
